selectedTaskBefore.title: Align nested inspection-root and execution-root semantics across prompting, execution, and verification
selectedTaskBefore.notes: Ralph can now inspect the nested `ralph-codex-vscode-starter` repo from the umbrella root, but execution and verifier working directories may still follow the workspace root unless commands manually `cd` into the nested repo. Make root-selection policy explicit, durable, and evidence-backed before expanding broader multi-agent behavior.
